Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Improving ductility via grain structure control in Sc/Zr modified Al-Cu-Li alloys by pulsed-laser powder bed fusion

Process_Text.original: LPBF using BLT S200 laser system with continuous laser mode; laser power 800 W; scanning speed 1000 mm/s; hatch spacing 0.08 mm; layer thickness 30 µm; inter-layer rotation 67°; substrate preheated to 150°C; argon atmosphere with oxygen < 300 ppm
Process_Text.simplified: Continuous laser LPBF, 800 W, 1000 mm/s, 30 µm layer thickness, 67° interlayer rotation

Microstructure_Text.original: Heterogeneous microstructure with alternating columnar grains (CG) at melt pool center and fine equiaxed grains (FG) at melt pool boundaries; epitaxial growth along [001] direction; continuous white precipitate network along grain boundaries in CG region; Al-Cu eutectic phases concentrated along grain boundaries; Sc accumulation follows Cu distribution forming chain-like pattern along CG boundaries; no significant Al3(Li,Sc,Zr) precipitates found in CG region
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Heterogeneous microstructure with CG and FG regions; columnar grains 2.17 µm, fine equiaxed grains 0.86 µm; Al3(Li,Sc,Zr) precipitates only in FG region

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.EBSD: IPF and GB maps showing heterogeneous CG+FG microstructure; 67° interlayer rotation resulting in similar microstructures in XOZ and YOZ planes
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.SEM: Columnar grains with continuous precipitate network; fine equiaxed grains near boundaries with denser precipitate distribution
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.TEM: Clear CG-FG boundary; Cu-rich phases along grain boundaries; Sc enrichment following Cu distribution in CG region; Al3(Li,Sc,Zr) precipitates in FG region with tangled dislocations
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.CT: Porosity 0.27%; 17,411 pores; 81.19% pores in 0-1000 µm³ range; max pore 352,904 µm³

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; cross-head displacement rate 1 mm/min; tensile axis perpendicular to build direction
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 6 mm gauge width, 2 mm gauge thickness, 24 mm gauge length

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; cross-head displacement rate 1 mm/min; tensile axis perpendicular to build direction
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 6 mm gauge width, 2 mm gauge thickness, 24 mm gauge length

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 6 mm gauge width, 2 mm gauge thickness, 24 mm gauge length
Properties_Info.Note: Continuous laser sample; weaker PLC effect observed

Process_Text.original: LPBF using Renishaw AM400 with 400 W quasi-continuous mode pulsed laser; laser power 800 W; exposure time 50 µs; delay time 10 µs; point spacing 60 µm; hatch spacing 0.08 mm; layer thickness 30 µm; inter-layer rotation 67°; substrate preheated to 150°C; argon atmosphere with oxygen < 300 ppm; equivalent scanning speed 1000 mm/s
Process_Text.simplified: Pulsed laser LPBF (PLPBF), 800 W, 50 µs exposure, 10 µs delay, 60 µm point spacing, 30 µm layer thickness, 67° interlayer rotation

Microstructure_Text.original: Fully equiaxed grain microstructure with sporadic short columnar grains; aspect ratio near 1:1; independent melt pools leading to higher proportion of fine grains; no obvious boundaries between columnar and equiaxed grains; network of Al-Cu eutectic phases at grain boundaries; no accumulation of Sc/Zr elements; uniform grain sizes; Al3(Li,Sc,Zr) precipitates distributed in both coarse and fine equiaxed grain regions with higher volume fraction in fine grain region (2-2.5%) compared to coarse region (0.5-1.1%)
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Fully equiaxed grain microstructure; grain size 0.91 µm average; Al3(Li,Sc,Zr) precipitates uniformly distributed; 40% grain refinement compared to continuous laser

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.EBSD: IPF and GB maps showing fully equiaxed microstructure; 67° interlayer rotation; elliptical melt pool morphology in XOY plane
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.SEM: Predominantly equiaxed grains; no obvious columnar-equiaxed boundaries; Al-Cu eutectic network at grain boundaries
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.TEM: Distinct equiaxed grain structure; Al3(Li,Sc,Zr) precipitates in FG region (2-2.5% vol%); fewer precipitates in LG region (0.5-1.1% vol%); discontinuous Al-Cu eutectic phase along FG boundaries; Sc displaced from boundaries forming clustered accumulations
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.CT: Porosity 0.21%; 4,068 pores; 76.01% pores in 0-1000 µm³ range; max pore 405,469 µm³

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; cross-head displacement rate 1 mm/min; tensile axis perpendicular to build direction
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 6 mm gauge width, 2 mm gauge thickness, 24 mm gauge length
Properties_Info.Note: Pulsed laser sample; ~57 MPa decrease vs CL sample due to loss of HDI strengthening
